query_normalized: robotic artificial intelligence algorithms for autonomous vehicle navigation robotics
rationale: The paper addresses the user's question by proposing a specific algorithmic framework (Quantum Neural Networks and Quantum Reinforcement Learning) for autonomous vehicle navigation, satisfying criteria (a) for studying the same mechanism (navigation algorithms) and (d) as a foundational proposal for this emerging sub-domain. Although it focuses on "Quantum" AI rather than classical robotics, it is a canonical reference for the specific intersection of AI algorithms and AV navigation requested.
